DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH.COM, DMITRY SHUBOV AND VLADIMIR SHUBOV's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendants' motion to strike portions of the second amended complaint (SAC) is denied. At a minimum, the material defendants want stricken is appropriate background for the SAC's claims.
